mapper.select: SELECT s.EMPLOYEE_ID, s.FIRST_NAME, s.LAST_NAME, s.EMAIL, s.HIRE_DATE, s.JOB_ID, s.SALARY, s.TENURE_MONTHS, s.DEPT_EMP_COUNT, s.DEPT_AVG_SALARY, s.DEPT_MAX_SALARY, s.DEPT_SALARY_RANK, NVL(s.PREV_SALARY_IN_DEPT, s.SALARY) AS PREV_SALARY_IN_DEPT, CASE WHEN s.SALARY >= s.DEPT_AVG_SALARY THEN 'ABOVE_DEPT_AVG' ELSE 'BELOW_DEPT_AVG' END AS DEPT_AVG_POSITION FROM ( SELECT e.EMPLOYEE_ID, e.FIRST_NAME, e.LAST_NAME, e.EMAIL, e.HIRE_DATE, e.JOB_ID, e.SALARY, TRUNC(MONTHS_BETWEEN(TRUNC(SYSDATE), TRUNC(e.HIRE_DATE))) AS TENURE_MONTHS, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY e.DEPARTMENT_ID) AS DEPT_EMP_COUNT, AVG(e.SALARY) OVER (PARTITION BY e.DEPARTMENT_ID) AS DEPT_AVG_SALARY, MAX(e.SALARY) OVER (PARTITION BY e.DEPARTMENT_ID) AS DEPT_MAX_SALARY, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY e.DEPARTMENT_ID ORDER BY e.SALARY DESC, e.EMPLOYEE_ID) AS DEPT_SALARY_RANK, LAG(e.SALARY) OVER (PARTITION BY e.DEPARTMENT_ID ORDER BY e.SALARY DESC, e.EMPLOYEE_ID) AS PREV_SALARY_IN_DEPT FROM EMPLOYEES e WHERE e.EMPLOYEE_ID >= #{p_emp_id_min} AND e.JOB_ID = #{p_job_id} AND e.SALARY >= #{p_min_salary} ) s WHERE s.TENURE_MONTHS >= 0 ORDER BY s.JOB_ID, s.SALARY DESC, s.EMPLOYEE_ID

SELECT g.JOB_ID, g.EMP_COUNT, g.TOTAL_SALARY, g.AVG_SALARY, g.MIN_SALARY, g.MAX_SALARY, g.P50_SALARY, g.HIGH_EARNER_COUNT, g.LOW_EARNER_COUNT, ROUND(g.HIGH_EARNER_RATIO, 6) AS HIGH_EARNER_RATIO, CASE WHEN g.AVG_SALARY >= g.P50_SALARY THEN 'AVG_ABOVE_MEDIAN' ELSE 'AVG_BELOW_MEDIAN' END AS AVG_VS_MEDIAN_STATUS FROM ( SELECT x.JOB_ID, COUNT(*) AS EMP_COUNT, SUM(x.SALARY) AS TOTAL_SALARY, AVG(x.SALARY) AS AVG_SALARY, MIN(x.SALARY) AS MIN_SALARY, MAX(x.SALARY) AS MAX_SALARY, PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY x.SALARY) AS P50_SALARY, SUM(CASE WHEN x.SALARY >= #{p_high_salary} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS HIGH_EARNER_COUNT, SUM(CASE WHEN x.SALARY < #{p_high_salary} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS LOW_EARNER_COUNT, RATIO_TO_REPORT(SUM(CASE WHEN x.SALARY >= #{p_high_salary} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) OVER () AS HIGH_EARNER_RATIO FROM ( SELECT e.JOB_ID, e.SALARY FROM EMPLOYEES e WHERE e.EMPLOYEE_ID >= #{p_emp_id_min} AND e.SALARY >= #{p_min_salary} ) x GROUP BY x.JOB_ID ) g WHERE g.EMP_COUNT >= #{p_min_emp_count} ORDER BY g.AVG_SALARY DESC, g.JOB_ID

SELECT q.EMPLOYEE_ID, q.JOB_ID, q.SALARY, q.TENURE_MONTHS, q.SALARY_SHARE_IN_JOB, q.JOB_SALARY_RN, q.JOB_SALARY_DR, q.JOB_SALARY_QUARTILE, NVL(q.PREV_SALARY_IN_JOB, q.SALARY) AS PREV_SALARY_IN_JOB, q.NEXT_SALARY_IN_JOB, ROUND(q.SALARY_GAP_FROM_JOB_AVG, 2) AS SALARY_GAP_FROM_JOB_AVG, CASE WHEN q.JOB_SALARY_RN = 1 THEN 'TOP_IN_JOB' WHEN q.JOB_SALARY_RN <= 3 THEN 'TOP3_IN_JOB' ELSE 'GENERAL_IN_JOB' END AS JOB_RANK_BAND FROM ( SELECT b.EMPLOYEE_ID, b.JOB_ID, b.SALARY, b.TENURE_MONTHS, b.SALARY_SHARE_IN_JOB, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY b.JOB_ID ORDER BY b.SALARY DESC, b.EMPLOYEE_ID) AS JOB_SALARY_RN, DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY b.JOB_ID ORDER BY b.SALARY DESC) AS JOB_SALARY_DR, NTILE(4) OVER (PARTITION BY b.JOB_ID ORDER BY b.SALARY DESC, b.EMPLOYEE_ID) AS JOB_SALARY_QUARTILE, LAG(b.SALARY) OVER (PARTITION BY b.JOB_ID ORDER BY b.SALARY DESC, b.EMPLOYEE_ID) AS PREV_SALARY_IN_JOB, LEAD(b.SALARY) OVER (PARTITION BY b.JOB_ID ORDER BY b.SALARY DESC, b.EMPLOYEE_ID) AS NEXT_SALARY_IN_JOB, b.SALARY - AVG(b.SALARY) OVER (PARTITION BY b.JOB_ID) AS SALARY_GAP_FROM_JOB_AVG FROM ( SELECT e.EMPLOYEE_ID, e.JOB_ID, e.SALARY, TRUNC(MONTHS_BETWEEN(TRUNC(SYSDATE), TRUNC(e.HIRE_DATE))) AS TENURE_MONTHS, RATIO_TO_REPORT(e.SALARY) OVER (PARTITION BY e.JOB_ID) AS SALARY_SHARE_IN_JOB FROM EMPLOYEES e WHERE e.EMPLOYEE_ID >= #{p_emp_id_min} AND e.JOB_ID = #{p_job_id} AND e.SALARY >= #{p_min_salary} ) b ) q WHERE q.TENURE_MONTHS >= 0 ORDER BY q.JOB_ID, q.SALARY DESC, q.EMPLOYEE_ID

SELECT r.EMPLOYEE_ID, r.EMP_NAME, r.JOB_ID, r.JOB_TITLE, r.SALARY, r.MIN_SALARY, r.MAX_SALARY, r.JOB_EMP_COUNT, r.JOB_AVG_SALARY, r.JOB_MAX_SALARY, ROUND(r.SALARY_TO_JOB_AVG_RATIO, 6) AS SALARY_TO_JOB_AVG_RATIO, CASE WHEN r.SALARY > r.MAX_SALARY THEN 'ABOVE_JOB_MAX' WHEN r.SALARY < r.MIN_SALARY THEN 'BELOW_JOB_MIN' ELSE 'IN_JOB_RANGE' END AS JOB_RANGE_STATUS FROM ( SELECT e.EMPLOYEE_ID, e.FIRST_NAME || ' ' || e.LAST_NAME AS EMP_NAME, e.JOB_ID, j.JOB_TITLE, e.SALARY, j.MIN_SALARY, j.MAX_SALARY, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY e.JOB_ID) AS JOB_EMP_COUNT, AVG(e.SALARY) OVER (PARTITION BY e.JOB_ID) AS JOB_AVG_SALARY, MAX(e.SALARY) OVER (PARTITION BY e.JOB_ID) AS JOB_MAX_SALARY, e.SALARY / NULLIF(AVG(e.SALARY) OVER (PARTITION BY e.JOB_ID), 0) AS SALARY_TO_JOB_AVG_RATIO FROM EMPLOYEES e JOIN JOBS j ON e.JOB_ID = j.JOB_ID WHERE e.EMPLOYEE_ID >= #{p_emp_id_min} AND e.JOB_ID = #{p_job_id} AND e.SALARY >= #{p_min_salary} ) r ORDER BY r.JOB_ID, r.SALARY DESC, r.EMPLOYEE_ID

SELECT s.JOB_ID, s.JOB_TITLE, s.EMP_COUNT, s.TOTAL_SALARY, s.AVG_SALARY, s.MIN_SALARY, s.MAX_SALARY, s.EMP_P50_SALARY, s.JOB_MIN_SALARY, s.JOB_MAX_SALARY, s.ABOVE_JOB_MAX_COUNT, s.BELOW_JOB_MIN_COUNT, CASE WHEN s.AVG_SALARY >= s.EMP_P50_SALARY THEN 'AVG_AT_OR_ABOVE_MEDIAN' ELSE 'AVG_BELOW_MEDIAN' END AS JOB_PAY_STATUS FROM ( SELECT e.JOB_ID, j.JOB_TITLE, COUNT(*) AS EMP_COUNT, SUM(e.SALARY) AS TOTAL_SALARY, AVG(e.SALARY) AS AVG_SALARY, MIN(e.SALARY) AS MIN_SALARY, MAX(e.SALARY) AS MAX_SALARY, PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY e.SALARY) AS EMP_P50_SALARY, MIN(j.MIN_SALARY) AS JOB_MIN_SALARY, MAX(j.MAX_SALARY) AS JOB_MAX_SALARY, SUM(CASE WHEN e.SALARY > j.MAX_SALARY THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ABOVE_JOB_MAX_COUNT, SUM(CASE WHEN e.SALARY < j.MIN_SALARY THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS BELOW_JOB_MIN_COUNT FROM EMPLOYEES e JOIN JOBS j ON e.JOB_ID = j.JOB_ID WHERE e.SALARY >= #{p_min_salary} AND e.EMPLOYEE_ID >= #{p_emp_id_min} GROUP BY e.JOB_ID, j.JOB_TITLE ) s WHERE s.EMP_COUNT >= #{p_min_emp_count} ORDER BY s.AVG_SALARY DESC, s.JOB_ID

SELECT z.EMPLOYEE_ID, z.EMP_NAME, z.JOB_ID, z.JOB_TITLE, z.SALARY, z.MIN_SALARY, z.MAX_SALARY, z.JOB_SALARY_RANK, z.JOB_SALARY_DENSE_RANK, z.JOB_EMP_COUNT, ROUND(z.SALARY_GAP_FROM_MAX, 2) AS SALARY_GAP_FROM_MAX, ROUND(z.SALARY_GAP_FROM_MIN, 2) AS SALARY_GAP_FROM_MIN, CASE WHEN z.SALARY > z.MAX_SALARY THEN 'ABOVE_JOB_MAX' WHEN z.SALARY < z.MIN_SALARY THEN 'BELOW_JOB_MIN' ELSE 'IN_JOB_RANGE' END AS JOB_RANGE_STATUS FROM ( SELECT e.EMPLOYEE_ID, e.FIRST_NAME || ' ' || e.LAST_NAME AS EMP_NAME, e.JOB_ID, j.JOB_TITLE, e.SALARY, j.MIN_SALARY, j.MAX_SALARY, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY e.JOB_ID ORDER BY e.SALARY DESC, e.EMPLOYEE_ID) AS JOB_SALARY_RANK, DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY e.JOB_ID ORDER BY e.SALARY DESC) AS JOB_SALARY_DENSE_RANK, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY e.JOB_ID) AS JOB_EMP_COUNT, j.MAX_SALARY - e.SALARY AS SALARY_GAP_FROM_MAX, e.SALARY - j.MIN_SALARY AS SALARY_GAP_FROM_MIN FROM EMPLOYEES e JOIN JOBS j ON e.JOB_ID = j.JOB_ID WHERE e.EMPLOYEE_ID >= #{p_emp_id_min} AND e.SALARY >= #{p_min_salary} ) z WHERE z.JOB_SALARY_RANK <= #{p_top_n} ORDER BY z.JOB_ID, z.JOB_SALARY_RANK, z.EMPLOYEE_ID

SELECT m.EMPLOYEE_ID, m.FIRST_NAME, m.LAST_NAME, m.EMAIL, m.PHONE_NUMBER, m.HIRE_DATE, m.DEPARTMENT_ID, m.DEPARTMENT_NAME, m.JOB_ID, m.JOB_TITLE, m.SALARY, m.COMMISSION_PCT, m.MANAGER_ID, m.DEPT_MANAGER_ID, m.DEPT_EMP_COUNT, m.DEPT_AVG_SALARY, m.DEPT_MAX_SALARY, m.JOB_SALARY_RANK, CASE WHEN m.SALARY >= 20000 THEN 'EXEC' WHEN m.SALARY >= 12000 THEN 'HIGH' WHEN m.SALARY >= 7000 THEN 'MID' ELSE 'LOW' END AS SALARY_BAND FROM ( SELECT e.EMPLOYEE_ID, e.FIRST_NAME, e.LAST_NAME, e.EMAIL, e.PHONE_NUMBER, e.HIRE_DATE, e.DEPARTMENT_ID, d.DEPARTMENT_NAME, e.JOB_ID, j.JOB_TITLE, e.SALARY, e.COMMISSION_PCT, e.MANAGER_ID, d.MANAGER_ID AS DEPT_MANAGER_ID, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY e.DEPARTMENT_ID) AS DEPT_EMP_COUNT, AVG(e.SALARY) OVER (PARTITION BY e.DEPARTMENT_ID) AS DEPT_AVG_SALARY, MAX(e.SALARY) OVER (PARTITION BY e.DEPARTMENT_ID) AS DEPT_MAX_SALARY, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY e.JOB_ID ORDER BY e.SALARY DESC, e.EMPLOYEE_ID) AS JOB_SALARY_RANK FROM EMPLOYEES e LEFT JOIN DEPARTMENTS d ON d.DEPARTMENT_ID = e.DEPARTMENT_ID LEFT JOIN JOBS j ON j.JOB_ID = e.JOB_ID WHERE e.EMPLOYEE_ID >= #{p_emp_id_min} AND e.SALARY >= #{p_min_salary} ) m ORDER BY m.DEPARTMENT_ID, m.JOB_ID, m.SALARY DESC, m.EMPLOYEE_ID

SELECT q.EMPLOYEE_ID, q.DEPARTMENT_ID, q.DEPARTMENT_NAME, q.JOB_ID, q.JOB_TITLE, q.SALARY, q.DEPT_SALARY_RANK, q.DEPT_EMP_COUNT, q.DEPT_TOTAL_SALARY, q.DEPT_AVG_SALARY, q.DEPT_P50_SALARY, ROUND(q.SALARY_SHARE_IN_DEPT, 6) AS SALARY_SHARE_IN_DEPT, CASE WHEN q.SALARY >= q.DEPT_P50_SALARY THEN 'ABOVE_DEPT_MEDIAN' ELSE 'BELOW_DEPT_MEDIAN' END AS DEPT_MEDIAN_POSITION FROM ( SELECT e.EMPLOYEE_ID, e.DEPARTMENT_ID, d.DEPARTMENT_NAME, e.JOB_ID, j.JOB_TITLE, e.SALARY, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY e.DEPARTMENT_ID ORDER BY e.SALARY DESC, e.EMPLOYEE_ID) AS DEPT_SALARY_RANK, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY e.DEPARTMENT_ID) AS DEPT_EMP_COUNT, SUM(e.SALARY) OVER (PARTITION BY e.DEPARTMENT_ID) AS DEPT_TOTAL_SALARY, AVG(e.SALARY) OVER (PARTITION BY e.DEPARTMENT_ID) AS DEPT_AVG_SALARY, PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY e.SALARY) OVER (PARTITION BY e.DEPARTMENT_ID) AS DEPT_P50_SALARY, RATIO_TO_REPORT(e.SALARY) OVER (PARTITION BY e.DEPARTMENT_ID) AS SALARY_SHARE_IN_DEPT FROM EMPLOYEES e LEFT JOIN DEPARTMENTS d ON d.DEPARTMENT_ID = e.DEPARTMENT_ID LEFT JOIN JOBS j ON j.JOB_ID = e.JOB_ID WHERE e.DEPARTMENT_ID = #{p_department_id} AND e.SALARY >= #{p_min_salary} ) q ORDER BY q.DEPARTMENT_ID, q.DEPT_SALARY_RANK, q.EMPLOYEE_ID

SELECT t.EMPLOYEE_ID, t.DEPARTMENT_NAME, t.JOB_TITLE, t.SALARY, t.MIN_SALARY, t.MAX_SALARY, t.DEPT_AVG_SALARY, t.DEPT_MAX_SALARY, t.JOB_MIN_SALARY, t.JOB_MAX_SALARY, t.MANAGER_EXISTS_YN, CASE WHEN t.MAX_SALARY IS NULL THEN 'NO_JOB_RANGE' WHEN t.SALARY > t.MAX_SALARY THEN 'ABOVE_JOB_MAX' WHEN t.SALARY < t.MIN_SALARY THEN 'BELOW_JOB_MIN' ELSE 'IN_JOB_RANGE' END AS JOB_RANGE_STATUS, CASE WHEN t.SALARY >= t.DEPT_AVG_SALARY THEN 'ABOVE_DEPT_AVG' ELSE 'BELOW_DEPT_AVG' END AS DEPT_AVG_POSITION FROM ( SELECT e.EMPLOYEE_ID, d.DEPARTMENT_NAME, j.JOB_TITLE, e.SALARY, j.MIN_SALARY, j.MAX_SALARY, AVG(e.SALARY) OVER (PARTITION BY e.DEPARTMENT_ID) AS DEPT_AVG_SALARY, MAX(e.SALARY) OVER (PARTITION BY e.DEPARTMENT_ID) AS DEPT_MAX_SALARY, MIN(e.SALARY) OVER (PARTITION BY e.JOB_ID) AS JOB_MIN_SALARY, MAX(e.SALARY) OVER (PARTITION BY e.JOB_ID) AS JOB_MAX_SALARY, CASE WHEN e.MANAGER_ID IS NULL THEN 'NO_MANAGER' ELSE 'HAS_MANAGER' END AS MANAGER_EXISTS_YN FROM EMPLOYEES e LEFT JOIN DEPARTMENTS d ON d.DEPARTMENT_ID = e.DEPARTMENT_ID LEFT JOIN JOBS j ON j.JOB_ID = e.JOB_ID WHERE e.EMPLOYEE_ID >= #{p_emp_id_min} AND e.DEPARTMENT_ID = #{p_department_id} ) t ORDER BY t.DEPARTMENT_NAME, t.JOB_TITLE, t.SALARY DESC, t.EMPLOYEE_ID

SELECT x.EMPLOYEE_ID, x.FIRST_NAME, x.LAST_NAME, x.DEPARTMENT_NAME, x.JOB_TITLE, x.CURRENT_SALARY, x.COMMISSION_PCT, x.JOB_SALARY_RANK, x.DEPT_SALARY_RANK, x.DEPT_EMP_COUNT, x.JOB_EMP_COUNT, x.DEPT_AVG_SALARY, x.JOB_AVG_SALARY, ROUND(x.SALARY_SHARE_IN_JOB, 6) AS SALARY_SHARE_IN_JOB, ROUND(x.SALARY_SHARE_IN_DEPT, 6) AS SALARY_SHARE_IN_DEPT, CASE WHEN x.JOB_SALARY_RANK = 1 THEN 'TOP_IN_JOB' WHEN x.DEPT_SALARY_RANK = 1 THEN 'TOP_IN_DEPT' ELSE 'GENERAL' END AS SALARY_POSITION FROM ( SELECT e.EMPLOYEE_ID, e.FIRST_NAME, e.LAST_NAME, d.DEPARTMENT_NAME, j.JOB_TITLE, e.SALARY AS CURRENT_SALARY, NVL(e.COMMISSION_PCT, 0) AS COMMISSION_PCT, DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY e.JOB_ID ORDER BY e.SALARY DESC) AS JOB_SALARY_RANK, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY e.DEPARTMENT_ID ORDER BY e.SALARY DESC, e.EMPLOYEE_ID) AS DEPT_SALARY_RANK, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY e.DEPARTMENT_ID) AS DEPT_EMP_COUNT, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY e.JOB_ID) AS JOB_EMP_COUNT, AVG(e.SALARY) OVER (PARTITION BY e.DEPARTMENT_ID) AS DEPT_AVG_SALARY, AVG(e.SALARY) OVER (PARTITION BY e.JOB_ID) AS JOB_AVG_SALARY, RATIO_TO_REPORT(e.SALARY) OVER (PARTITION BY e.JOB_ID) AS SALARY_SHARE_IN_JOB, RATIO_TO_REPORT(e.SALARY) OVER (PARTITION BY e.DEPARTMENT_ID) AS SALARY_SHARE_IN_DEPT FROM EMPLOYEES e LEFT JOIN DEPARTMENTS d ON d.DEPARTMENT_ID = e.DEPARTMENT_ID LEFT JOIN JOBS j ON j.JOB_ID = e.JOB_ID WHERE e.SALARY >= #{p_min_salary} AND e.EMPLOYEE_ID >= #{p_emp_id_min} ) x ORDER BY x.DEPARTMENT_NAME, x.JOB_TITLE, x.CURRENT_SALARY DESC, x.EMPLOYEE_ID

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT d.DEPARTMENT_ID, d.DEPARTMENT_NAME, e.EMPLOYEE_ID, e.FIRST_NAME, e.LAST_NAME, e.SALARY, jh.JOB_ID, jh.START_DATE, jh.END_DATE FROM DEPARTMENTS d JOIN EMPLOYEES e ON e.DEPARTMENT_ID = d.DEPARTMENT_ID LEFT JOIN JOB_HISTORY jh ON jh.EMPLOYEE_ID = e.EMPLOYEE_ID WHERE d.DEPARTMENT_ID >= #{p_department_id_min} AND e.SALARY >= #{p_min_salary} AND e.SALARY >= #{p_min_salary} ) bad_dept_emp WHERE 1 = 1 AND 1 = 1

SELECT t.DEPARTMENT_ID, t.DEPARTMENT_NAME, t.EMP_COUNT, t.TOTAL_SALARY, t.AVG_SALARY FROM ( SELECT d.DEPARTMENT_ID, d.DEPARTMENT_NAME, COUNT(e.EMPLOYEE_ID) AS EMP_COUNT, SUM(e.SALARY) AS TOTAL_SALARY, AVG(e.SALARY) AS AVG_SALARY FROM DEPARTMENTS d LEFT JOIN EMPLOYEES e ON e.DEPARTMENT_ID = d.DEPARTMENT_ID GROUP BY d.DEPARTMENT_ID, d.DEPARTMENT_NAME HAVING d.DEPARTMENT_ID >= #{p_department_id_min} AND d.DEPARTMENT_ID >= #{p_department_id_min} ) t WHERE TO_CHAR(t.DEPARTMENT_ID) || '-' || TO_CHAR(t.EMP_COUNT) LIKE #{p_dept_emp_pattern}

SELECT x.DEPARTMENT_ID, x.DEPARTMENT_NAME, x.EMP_COUNT, x.AVG_SALARY FROM ( SELECT d.DEPARTMENT_ID, d.DEPARTMENT_NAME, COUNT(e.EMPLOYEE_ID) AS EMP_COUNT, AVG(e.SALARY) AS AVG_SALARY, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EMPLOYEES e2 WHERE e2.DEPARTMENT_ID = d.DEPARTMENT_ID AND e2.SALARY > ( SELECT AVG(e3.SALARY) FROM EMPLOYEES e3 WHERE e3.DEPARTMENT_ID = d.DEPARTMENT_ID ) ) AS ABOVE_DEPT_AVG_CNT FROM DEPARTMENTS d LEFT JOIN EMPLOYEES e ON e.DEPARTMENT_ID = d.DEPARTMENT_ID WHERE d.DEPARTMENT_ID >= #{p_department_id_min} GROUP BY d.DEPARTMENT_ID, d.DEPARTMENT_NAME ) x WHERE x.DEPARTMENT_ID NOT IN ( SELECT e4.DEPARTMENT_ID FROM EMPLOYEES e4 WHERE e4.COMMISSION_PCT IS NULL )

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT t1.*, ROWNUM AS RN FROM ( SELECT e.EMPLOYEE_ID, e.HIRE_DATE, e.JOB_ID, e.DEPARTMENT_ID, e.SALARY FROM EMPLOYEES e WHERE e.EMPLOYEE_ID >= #{p_emp_id_min} AND e.EMPLOYEE_ID IN ( SELECT e2.EMPLOYEE_ID FROM EMPLOYEES e2 WHERE e2.DEPARTMENT_ID = e.DEPARTMENT_ID ) ) t1 WHERE ROWNUM <= 10 ) WHERE RN > 3

SELECT a.EMPLOYEE_ID, TO_CHAR(TO_CHAR(a.HIRE_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD')) AS HIRE_DATE_TXT, TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(a.SALARY)) AS SALARY_NUM, TO_CHAR(TO_CHAR(a.JOB_ID)) AS JOB_ID_TXT, TO_CHAR(TO_CHAR(a.DEPARTMENT_ID)) AS DEPARTMENT_ID_TXT FROM ( SELECT e.EMPLOYEE_ID, e.HIRE_DATE, e.SALARY, e.JOB_ID, e.DEPARTMENT_ID FROM EMPLOYEES e WHERE TO_CHAR(e.EMPLOYEE_ID) = #{p_emp_id_txt} OR TO_CHAR(e.EMPLOYEE_ID) = #{p_emp_id_txt} ) a

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT e.EMPLOYEE_ID, e.FIRST_NAME, e.LAST_NAME, e.SALARY, e.DEPARTMENT_ID FROM EMPLOYEES e WHERE e.EMPLOYEE_ID >= #{p_emp_id_min} ) inner_emp ORDER BY inner_emp.SALARY DESC ) outer_emp WHERE outer_emp.SALARY >= #{p_min_salary}

SELECT DISTINCT e.EMPLOYEE_ID, e.FIRST_NAME || ' ' || e.LAST_NAME || '-' || d.DEPARTMENT_NAME AS EMP_LABEL, j.JOB_TITLE, e.SALARY FROM EMPLOYEES e JOIN DEPARTMENTS d ON d.DEPARTMENT_ID = e.DEPARTMENT_ID JOIN JOBS j ON j.JOB_ID = e.JOB_ID WHERE e.EMPLOYEE_ID >= #{p_emp_id_min} AND (e.FIRST_NAME || e.LAST_NAME || d.DEPARTMENT_NAME) LIKE #{p_name_keyword}

SELECT e.EMPLOYEE_ID, e.FIRST_NAME, e.LAST_NAME, e.SALARY, d.DEPARTMENT_NAME, j.JOB_TITLE FROM EMPLOYEES e JOIN DEPARTMENTS d ON d.DEPARTMENT_ID = e.DEPARTMENT_ID JOIN JOBS j ON j.JOB_ID = e.JOB_ID WHERE TO_CHAR(e.HIRE_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') = #{p_hire_date_txt} AND TO_CHAR(e.HIRE_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') = #{p_hire_date_txt} AND TO_CHAR(e.SALARY) = #{p_salary_txt}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT d.DEPARTMENT_ID, d.DEPARTMENT_NAME, COUNT(e.EMPLOYEE_ID) AS EMP_COUNT, AVG(e.SALARY) AS AVG_SALARY FROM DEPARTMENTS d, EMPLOYEES e WHERE d.DEPARTMENT_ID >= #{p_department_id_min} AND e.SALARY >= #{p_min_salary} GROUP BY d.DEPARTMENT_ID, d.DEPARTMENT_NAME ) bad_cross WHERE bad_cross.EMP_COUNT >= 0

SELECT paged_bad.* FROM ( SELECT final_bad.*, ROWNUM AS RN FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT s.DEPARTMENT_ID, s.DEPARTMENT_NAME, s.EMPLOYEE_ID, s.JOB_ID, s.SALARY, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM JOB_HISTORY jh WHERE jh.EMPLOYEE_ID = s.EMPLOYEE_ID AND jh.JOB_ID = s.JOB_ID ) AS JOB_HISTORY_CNT FROM ( SELECT d.DEPARTMENT_ID, d.DEPARTMENT_NAME, e.EMPLOYEE_ID, e.JOB_ID, e.SALARY FROM DEPARTMENTS d LEFT JOIN EMPLOYEES e ON e.DEPARTMENT_ID = d.DEPARTMENT_ID WHERE d.DEPARTMENT_ID >= #{p_department_id_min} AND (TO_CHAR(d.DEPARTMENT_ID) || '-' || TO_CHAR(e.EMPLOYEE_ID)) LIKE #{p_concat_key} ) s ) final_bad WHERE ROWNUM <= 20 ) paged_bad
